name: Squid Stuffed with Clams or Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Rinse squid and drain. Chop tentacles coarsely. Set aside.
3. Saute shallot and garlic in butter over medium heat in a heavy skillet until soft.
4. Add tomatoes, tentacles, clams or scallops, wine, parsley, thyme, and pepper and cook, stirring over medium heat for 3 minutes.
5. Remove from heat. Stir in breadcrumbs and egg.
6. Spoon stuffing mixture into squid bodies. Tie ends closed with kitchen string. Arrange in a single layer in a baking dish.
7. Cover and bake about 1 hour or until tender.
